title: rosa × collina var. dumetorum
intro: Rosa × collina var. dumetorum, also known as the wild rose or prickly rose, is a deciduous shrub that belongs to the Rosa genus and is native to North America. The medicinal properties of this plant are attributed to its hips, which contain high levels of vitamin C, flavonoids, and anthocyanins. The health benefits of Rosa × collina var. dumetorum include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system, making it a popular remedy for colds, fever, and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Rosa × collina var. dumetorum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to soothe sore throats, calm digestive issues, and promote overall well-being.
